title: AnalyticsRequest
description: Common parameters for analytics data requests.

from.description: Start date for the analytics query in YYYY-MM-DD format. Maximum range is 90 days.

to.description: End date for the analytics query in YYYY-MM-DD format.

duration.description: Aggregation duration for time series data.

skip.description: Number of records to skip for pagination.

limit.description: Maximum number of records to return.
